integration_validation_v2.evidence: comfy.rs:2755-2831 push_comfy_workflow_history_filters / list_comfy_workflow_history / comfy_workflow_stats build real filtered SQL over atelier_comfy_workflow_receipt by character/spec/status/time and GROUP BY status; tests/atelier_comfy_tests.rs:1080-1194 records success+failed+other-character receipts and asserts history includes failures, status filter, and stats total/failure/status_counts.

integration_validation_v3.basis: v2 PASS re-affirmed in v3: deliverable unchanged by remediation diff; full-crate test sweep green on Handshake-managed PostgreSQL at 17b2abd4 proves no regression. v2 evidence retained in integration_validation_v2.
